proof_cards.title: Commercial tourist airboat aluminum restored
proof_cards.result: AlumiBrite and Torque restored the hull and aluminum on a working tourist airboat, without the hydrofluoric or hydrochloric acid standard brighteners rely on.
proof_cards.image_alt: Oxidized diamond-plate airboat aluminum before restoration
proof_cards.image_after_alt: Same airboat aluminum restored bright with VertKleen AlumiBrite and Torque

proof_cards.title: Farm HVAC rust removed, one application
proof_cards.result: VertKleen HCR cleared heavy rust and scale on Brevard County farm HVAC and diamond-plated stainless without hydrochloric acid handling and with no pitting of the metal.
proof_cards.image_alt: Rust and scale on Brevard County farm diamond-plate before cleaning
proof_cards.image_after_alt: Same diamond-plate cleared of rust with VertKleen HCR, no pitting

proof_cards.title: Full CR + HCR CIP at seven Florida breweries
proof_cards.result: CR alkaline wash then HCR acid wash matched or beat caustic soda plus acid blends at equal concentration and CIP time. Final sanitation requirements remain label- and site-protocol dependent.
proof_cards.image_alt: Brewery tank and heat exchanger cleaned with VertKleen CR and HCR

proof_cards.title: Commercial kitchen deep-degreased
proof_cards.result: CRHD cut baked-on grease from commercial kitchen equipment at high dilution, low-foam for easier rinse, without solvent or butyl odor in the space.
proof_cards.image_alt: Grease buildup on commercial kitchen equipment before cleaning
proof_cards.image_after_alt: Commercial kitchen cooking line cleaned with VertKleen CRHD

proof_cards.title: 20-year rust and scale, cleared in 30 minutes
proof_cards.result: CLR ran for 36 hours and failed. VertKleen HCR cleared the same rust and scale in half an hour, verified by DDC Engineering (David DaSilva, PE).
proof_cards.image_alt: Rusted HVAC component cleared with VertKleen HCR

proof_cards.title: Fire-pump solenoid and cavity descaled
proof_cards.result: VertKleen Descaler cleared scale from a fire-protection pump without acid washing, on a Siemens maintenance program, with no aggressive corrosion to the assembly.
proof_cards.image_alt: Fire-pump component descaled with VertKleen Descaler

proof_cards.title: Restaurant hood filters and floors degreased
proof_cards.result: NeatFreaks crews ran VertKleen across Boca Raton restaurants. About 32 oz of CRHD mopped 2,500 square feet, replacing caustic and solvent degreasers.
proof_cards.image_alt: Greasy commercial kitchen hood filters before cleaning
proof_cards.image_after_alt: Hood filters degreased clean with VertKleen CR

proof_cards.title: Grout, grime, moss, and algae cleared
proof_cards.result: CR and LAM3 cleared biological growth and grime from grout, concrete, tile, and exterior surfaces without harsh acid or solvent cleaning.
proof_cards.image_alt: Grime and biological growth in tile grout before cleaning
proof_cards.image_after_alt: Tile and grout cleaned with VertKleen CR and LAM3

proof_cards.title: AC coil cleaned, lower monthly bill
proof_cards.result: A residential AC coil was cleaned and preserved with VertKleen Descaler, aluminum-fin compatible, reportedly cutting about $75 per month off the cooling bill.
proof_cards.image_alt: Residential AC coil cleaned with VertKleen Descaler

proof_cards.title: Bunker-fuel tank cleaning test
proof_cards.result: Trinidad test notes say CR removed oil residue with less product than a butoxyethanol comparator. The same report cautions that formal test procedure and environmental review should be written before scaling the method.
proof_cards.image_alt: Bunker-fuel tank side before and after cleaning with VertKleen CR

proof_cards.title: Occupied campus cleaned by drone at UF Shands
proof_cards.result: Clean Team USA used VertKleen MultiWash with an Apellix pressure-washing drone to clear years of scale and algae from trim, caulking, and glass, with the hospital occupied.
proof_cards.image_alt: Dirty UF Shands campus rooftops before VertKleen drone wash
proof_cards.image_after_alt: Building exterior after VertKleen drone wash, scale and algae cleared

proof_cards.title: Simple Green replaced across Walmart DCs
proof_cards.result: CRHD at about 50% active replaced Simple Green and Calci-Solve for heavy degreasing, saving an estimated $10k+ per year at one center. Crown and Plug Power supporting documents are available on request.
proof_cards.image_alt: Crown lift equipment in the Walmart distribution center cleaning program

proof_cards.title: Refrigeration descaling in one maintenance window
proof_cards.result: Walmart refrigeration material reports Descaler protocols across ammonia condenser circuits, warm-water heating, aluminum coils, copper bundles, and heat exchangers, with 4-8 hour descale windows by system.
proof_cards.image_alt: Walmart refrigeration descaling results table for VertKleen Descaler

proof_cards.title: 43-foot Yellowfin washed and waxed dockside
proof_cards.result: VertKleen Torque cleaned and protected the hull and topsides in one step, within OEM finish-care requirements, with no harsh fumes around the water.
proof_cards.image_alt: 43-foot Yellowfin vessel washed and waxed with VertKleen Torque
